title: HS Vanilla Template v1.0
description: Template for creating assemblies focused on the local HighSchool server
body:
# HS Vanilla Template

This modpack is a template with a set of default mods (in my opinion) on top of which it is easy to assemble the modpack you need.


## Performance
HS Vanilla Template is usually faster than OptiFine thanks to modern performance mods such as Sodium, Lithium and more!

## Changes

HS Vanilla Template includes a few minor changes that don't break the vanilla feel, only improve it, such as:
- improved fortresses in the nether world
- new types of villages. Soaring and underground
- various inventory interaction improvements (sorting, new picked up icon, item rarity frame)
- new vanilla block structures to populate the world
- the combat system from mc dungeons because it is more fun than the standard one
- and more 

# Installation

To install on a client, you just need to use a supported launcher or read the [official modrinth documentation](https://docs.modrinth.com/docs/modpacks/playing_modpacks/)

To install the server part (if necessary) later I will add the server version
